parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-1 per-exercise e1RM parity — plateau / flat history. Five completed push-a bench-press sessions at a FLAT top weight (60 kg every session, reps 6, default rir 2). The REAL e1rmEngine still yields a median_recent current and a high-confidence best, but current == best (no upward trend). Direct contrast to progressive-overload-v1: same count/cadence, flat weight. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (push-a / bench-press). Five sessions daysAgo 14/11/8/5/2, flat 60 kg => every e1rm equal => median == min == that value; zero spread => high confidence.
